series_metadata.series_title: SALES TAX SUPPLEMENT SHEETS ST10-G and ST10-T
series_metadata.series_description: County by county breakdown of sales tax liability figures for vendors who hold transient, service and cumulative vendors licenses.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years then destroy by shredding. Retain for 6 months after scanned. ; Electronic: Retain for 4 years then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
